title: Verifier Result
description: Result schema for the verifier role. The verifier checks every acceptance criterion using only approved verification commands. Each criterion must be independently evaluated with evidence.

criterion.description: Exact text of the acceptance criterion from the manifest.

status.description: Whether the criterion was met, failed, or could not be evaluated.

evidence.description: Proof of the criterion's status. Required when status is pass or fail.

criteria_results.description: One entry per acceptance criterion. Must exactly match manifest criteria count.

examples.summary: 4 of 5 criteria pass. Token refresh rotation is not implemented -- the refresh endpoint reuses the same token.

criteria_results.criterion: Token refresh endpoint returns new access token
evidence: curl -X POST /auth/refresh: response contains new access_token
curl output shows identical refresh_token in request and response. No rotation.

criteria_results.criterion: Expired tokens return 401 with error message
evidence: curl with expired token: HTTP 401 {"error": "token_expired", "message": "Token has expired"}
